title: Planetella undefined-B
author: Ševčík, Jan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: Planetella  sp. B    Material examined. SLOVAKIA: Cerová vrchovina Protected Landscape Area, Salonkáš, 11.x.2018, larva in gall on  Carex hirta , specimen after DNA extraction, No. PLA14c, J. Ševčík leg. (coll. JSL-UOC).    Comments.  Only larva of this species was found. The gall was unusually placed in the middle of the stem of  Carex hirta  (Fig. 2B). The adult specimens remain unknown. According to the position in the phylogenetic tree (Fig. 15), its closest relative is  Planetella riparia  sp. nov.
